positive: A whimsical, stylized nocturnal forest scene, featuring bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition is highly centered, presenting silhouettes of elegant, stylized woodland animals (like foxes, deer, and owls) intertwined with glowing, oversized mushrooms and fern fronds. Use deep indigo and midnight blue as primary colors, contrasted sharply with vibrant electric teal, soft neon lavender, and pops of luminous chartreuse. The aesthetic should be highly illustrative, resembling high-end Nordic folk art meets sophisticated vaporwave, with clean, sharp outlines and a magical, ethereal glow. Perfect for a central, repeating apparel print. Cinematic volumetric lighting, symmetrical composition, flat graphic style with depth.
negative: blur, watermark, text, signature, low quality, grainy, artifacts, bad anatomy, ugly, out of frame, cartoon, hyperrealistic, messy, cluttered, jpeg artifacts
